query.title: Hashtag or Keyword
query.description: Instagram hashtag to scrape (without #). Example: fitness

type.title: Query Type
type.description: Type of query. Currently supports: hashtag

maxResults.title: Max Profiles
maxResults.description: Maximum number of profiles to extract. Keep under 150 for safety.

minFollowers.title: Minimum Followers
minFollowers.description: Only include profiles with this many followers or more. 0 = no filter.

maxFollowers.title: Maximum Followers
maxFollowers.description: Only include profiles with this many followers or less. 0 = no filter.

sessionCookie.title: Instagram Session Cookie (sessionid)
sessionCookie.description: OPTIONAL BUT RECOMMENDED: Log in to Instagram in your browser, copy the value of the 'sessionid' cookie, and paste it here to bypass login walls.
